label: sandbox • combined mode: host paths via file_read, VM paths via sandbox tools
query: Two files exist: notes/readme.md in the read-only host workspace, and data/info.txt in your sandbox home — for the sandbox one, use file_read with its absolute path under your sandbox home (relative paths resolve against the host workspace). Each contains a token line. Read both files, then write both tokens on one line (host token first, separated by a single space) to combined.txt in your sandbox home.
notes: Path-routing discipline in combined mode: reads on both surfaces must succeed with zero path-validation errors. The unified router serves absolute sandbox paths under the agent home (/workspace/agents/<id>/...) via the sandbox read bridge — the system prompt states the absolute home, so the query teaches the routing rule (absolute for sandbox, relative for host) without hardcoding a path. The audit pins zero errors on file_read; sandbox_read_file is hidden in combined mode. The combined output can only be produced by actually reading both sides.
